'''jawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:highmindedly|highmindedly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-w-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:highmindedly|highmindedly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jawate|jawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jawatesher|jawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jawatesherĂ«m|jawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jawatero|jawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jawateshĂ«|jawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jawateshĂ«m|jawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijawatero|gokijawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijawateshĂ«|gokijawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijawateshĂ«m|gokijawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojawankerom|gojawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojawankeshĂ«|gojawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojawankeshĂ«m|gojawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojawankeya|gojawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jawaterom|jawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jawatemu|jawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jawateya|jawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijawaterom|gokijawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijawatemu|gokijawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijawateya|gokijawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jawawate|jawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jawawatesher|jawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jawawatesherĂ«m|jawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jawawatero|jawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jawawateshĂ«|jawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jawawateshĂ«m|jawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijawawatero|gokijawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijawawateshĂ«|gokijawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijawawateshĂ«m|gokijawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojawawankerom|gojawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojawawankeshĂ«|gojawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojawawankeshĂ«m|gojawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojawawankeya|gojawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jawawaterom|jawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jawawatemu|jawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jawawateya|jawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijawawaterom|gokijawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijawawatemu|gokijawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijawawateya|gokijawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠwĂŠte|jĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠwĂŠtesher|jĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠwĂŠtero|jĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠwĂŠtero|gokijĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠwĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠwĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠwĂŠterom|jĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠwĂŠtemu|jĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠwĂŠteya|jĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠwĂŠterom|gokijĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠwĂŠteya|gokijĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafwafte|jafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafwaftesher|jafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafwaftesherĂ«m|jafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafwaftero|jafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafwafteshĂ«|jafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafwafteshĂ«m|jafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafwaftero|gokijafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafwafteshĂ«|gokijafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafwafteshĂ«m|gokijafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafwafnkerom|gojafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafwafnkeshĂ«|gojafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafwafnkeshĂ«m|gojafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafwafnkeya|gojafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafwafterom|jafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafwaftemu|jafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafwafteya|jafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafwafterom|gokijafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafwaftemu|gokijafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafwafteya|gokijafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
